name: Orange Tangerine Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef with marinade and let stand for 20 minutes.
2. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet until very hot.
3. Remove beef from marinade and add to the oil. Stir-fry until brown, about 2 minutes.
4. Remove beef and drain excess oil.
5. In the same pan, reheat remaining oil and stir-fry dried red chilies for 10 seconds.
6. Add beef, orange peel, and seasonings. Stir-fry for an additional 4 minutes, mixing well.
7. Serve immediately.
